findings.rule: Non-administrators remain forbidden from exporting customer records.

evidence.detail: The candidate checks only that an actor exists, so any authenticated role can export the record.

findings.concern: The change removes the role check at the data-export trust boundary.
findings.impact: Ordinary users can access tenant-private customer exports.
findings.proposed_change: Restore the administrator role check and cover a non-administrator denial.
findings.expected_effect: Preserve the required export authorization boundary.

next_action: Restore role-based authorization and add the missing denial test.
